response.justification: Bogdan is an outstanding fit, bringing over 15 years of experience heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and React. His recent work with AI agent infrastructure, combined with deep expertise in TDD, CI/CD, and cloud platforms, perfectly aligns with the core requirements of this senior fullstack role.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tools
Exceptional background in software testing, TDD, and CI/CD best practices
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest, though foundational skills are highly transferable
Java experience is somewhat dated (2016-2018), and Kotlin is not explicitly listed
Background spans many domains, which may require adjustment to strictly enterprise internal tooling
